plan_metadata.name: DA new-api oauth ts remote debug

steps.description: Click the "Declarative Agent" option in the "New Project" dialog within Visual Studio Code, selecting "Create your own agent by declaring instructions, actions..." under "Agents for Microsoft 365 Copilot".
Click the "No Action" option in the "Add an action to your declarative agent" dropdown menu within the "Create Declarative Agent" dialog in Microsoft Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Start with a New API" option in the "Create an Action" dropdown within Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Select "OAuth" from the "Authentication Type" dropdown in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension panel within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder" option (/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects) in the "Workspace Folder" dropdown within Visual Studio Code to select the project root location.
